# Live Helper Chat source imported for koshop

Source path on US02T:

- /var/www/livehelperchat

Imported path:

- third_party/live-helper-chat

Important:

- Runtime config files are intentionally excluded.
- Database password, installation settings, cache, uploaded files and logs are not committed.
- Production deployment should keep runtime config on server only.

Domains:

- Buyer storefront: https://shop.cn12.vip
- Dujiao Admin: https://admin.cn12.vip
- Live Helper Chat: https://kefu.cn12.vip
- Unified seller console: https://sell.cn12.vip
